metadata.description: Keeps AI-written E2E tests honest: generation is AI, drift detection is deterministic (SHA-256, AI-free), judgment is human. Config-driven skills on the SKILL.md open standard.

plugins.name: specproof
plugins.description: spec<->impl<->feature BDD flow: setup, bootstrap, new-feature, sync, drift, implement. Config-driven via specproof.config.yaml; framework-agnostic (playwright web, Flutter flutter_gherkin + Patrol).
